prompt: Close-up portrait of a man looking directly at the camera. His face and neck are mostly obscured by deep shadow. He is wearing a simple black shirt. The background is a plain, overcast grayish-blue sky. Dramatic, high-contrast lighting creates a moody, cinematic atmosphere.
